title: Implement left-click interception + client ShootC2SPacket sending

reference_files.reason: Interaction interception - AttackEntityEvent + PlayerInteractEvent.LeftClickBlock, cancel vanilla attack when main-hand is gun, client sends ShootC2SPacket every tick when left-click held
ShootC2SPacket client sending model - every tick when left-click held + main-hand is gun, stop on release, client doesn't calculate fire rate

acceptance_criteria: Server-side AttackEntityEvent listener: if player's main-hand item is gun (ModularShootAPI.isGun), cancel event (prevent vanilla entity attack damage)
Server-side PlayerInteractEvent.LeftClickBlock listener: if player's main-hand item is gun, cancel event (prevent vanilla block breaking)
Client-side left-click detection: when player holds left-click (attack key) and main-hand is gun, send ShootC2SPacket every client tick
Client stops sending packets when left-click released
ShootC2SPacket carries current gun's modifierVersion (from GunData component)
Client-side logic is minimal: only sends 'request shoot' signal, does NOT calculate fire rate or decide whether to shoot
Client-side tick listener registered (ClientTickEvent or similar) to check left-click status + send packet
Listeners registered on NeoForge.EVENT_BUS (game bus) for server-side, client-side on appropriate client bus
